articles.title: This startup’s super metals could soon be in military drones, luxury watches, and chef’s knives
articles.description: Instead of heating metals, Foundation Alloy beats them into submission. The startup has raised $22 million to scale up production of its alloys.

articles.title: SpaceX to acquire Cursor for $60B in stock, days after blockbuster IPO
articles.description: The deal is supposed to help SpaceX's struggling AI division. The company told IPO investors it sees a $26 trillion addressable market in AI.

articles.description: Glassnode data shows broad-based buying across retail and whale cohorts, with the Accumulation Trend Score reaching its strongest level of the current drawdown.

articles.title: ChatGPT’s market share slips below 50% for first time
articles.description: The chatbot still remains the most popular AI assistant worldwide with over 1.1 billion monthly users, followed by Gemini with 662 million and Claude with 245 million.

articles.title: Bitcoin rallies after Japan rate increase with XLM, INJ, UNI advancing
articles.description: Stellar’s XLM, Injective’s INJ and Uniswap’s UNI ranked among the best performers in the 100 biggest cryptocurrencies by market capitalization.

articles.title: Bitcoin doesn't need Ethereum-style yield, says Strategy's Michael Saylor
articles.description: Michael Saylor says Bitcoin does not need staking or inflation, outlining a five-layer “Digital Asset Stack” that generates returns through credit and equity products built around BTC.
